landing.heroSubtitle: PRISMX turns market monitoring into complete trade plans — entry, stop loss, take profit and risk-reward, all included. Like one? Send it to your own MT5 account in a single click. You know your maximum loss and profit target before you ever enter.
landing.ctaSecondary: See how we score win rate
landing.heroNote: No credit card · Your funds never leave your own broker account
landing.stat1: funds custodied — money stays at your own broker
landing.stat2: the cloud engine watches so you don't have to
landing.stat3: of signals scored — wins and losses, rules public
landing.statFootnote: Official partner broker: MakeCapital · live and demo MT5 accounts supported
landing.pain1Bad: You enter on a hunch, exit on a mood, and stop out on luck.
landing.pain1Good: Every signal ships with entry, stop, target and risk-reward. Your only decision: take it or skip it.
landing.pain2Bad: Right about direction, too slow to act; you hold losers and cut winners.
landing.pain2Good: One click, and your SL/TP are locked into MT5 at fill time — no willpower required after that.
landing.pain3Bad: Paid signal groups post the wins. The losers quietly disappear.
landing.pain3Good: Our win rate is scored by the market itself. Wins and losses both stay on the record — everyone sees the same number.
landing.featuresTitle: Not more signals — more complete trade plans
landing.featuresSubtitle: From "should I enter?" to "what now?" — every step is already thought through
landing.f1Title: A full plan, not just a direction
landing.f1Desc: Not "gold is going up" — a tradeable plan with entry, stop, target and R:R, generated around the clock by a multi-timeframe trend engine.
landing.f2Desc: Tap a signal and the order lands in your own MT5 account. No screen-switching, no typing prices, no window for hesitation.
landing.f3Desc: Your money never leaves your own broker account. PRISMX only sends trade instructions — we don't touch your funds, and we can't.
landing.f4Title: Position size by risk, not by guess
landing.f4Desc: Set the % of equity you're willing to risk and lot size is computed from the stop distance — "never lose more than 1% a trade" becomes the default, not a slogan.
landing.f5Desc: Order status, fill price and P&L stream back live. Unexecuted commands auto-void after 5 minutes — nothing ever fills silently at a stale price.
landing.f6Desc: Connect multiple MT5 terminals and manage equity, positions and orders — close or modify — from one place.
landing.wrTitle: Our win rate is scored by the market, not by us
landing.wrSubtitle: Every signal is tracked against live prices and scored by one public rule set — no cherry-picking, no "that one didn't count."
landing.wrRule1: Price hits take-profit first → counted as a win
landing.wrRule1Note: Based on actual price action, independent of anyone's execution.
landing.wrRule2: Price hits stop-loss first → counted as a loss
landing.wrRule2Note: A loss is a loss. It stays on the record — never deleted, never hidden.
landing.wrRule3: Both hit inside the same bar → conservatively scored as a loss
landing.wrRule3Note: When order can't be proven, we take the ugly number instead of guessing in our favor.
landing.wrRule4: Signals during feed outages → excluded from stats
landing.wrRule4Note: Neither a win nor a loss — bad data never pollutes the number.
landing.wrNote: After signing up you'll see the live signal win rate and your own real trading performance — tracked separately, neither one flattering the other.
landing.howTitle: Three steps from sign-up to your first trade
landing.howSubtitle: About five minutes, zero coding required
landing.step1Desc: Sign up free and instantly see the live signal board and historical win rate.
landing.step2Desc: Download the PRISMX connector, paste your private token, and your MakeCapital MT5 account comes online. No account yet? Opening one takes minutes — demo works too.
landing.step3Desc: Pick a signal, confirm the size (or just set a risk %), and the order — stop and target included — lands in your MT5.
landing.faq1q: Is my money safe? Do you ever touch my funds?
landing.faq1a: No — and we couldn't if we wanted to. Your funds stay in an account opened in your own name at our partner broker; PRISMX never holds money. Our connector does exactly one thing: sends the orders you confirmed to the MT5 terminal logged in on your own computer. You can disconnect or reset your token at any time.
landing.faq2q: Is this an auto-trading bot (EA)? Will it trade behind my back?
landing.faq2a: No. PRISMX never decides for you — every single order requires your explicit confirmation. What it automates is everything after the decision: position sizing, SL/TP placement, execution speed and receipts.
landing.faq3q: Is the win rate real? What stops you from faking it?
landing.faq3a: No human touches the scoring: signals are tracked against live prices — TP first is a win, SL first is a loss, a same-bar double-touch is scored against us, and feed-outage signals are excluded. Everyone sees the same number on the board, and we can't edit it either.
landing.faq4q: I'm a complete beginner. Can I use this?
landing.faq4a: Yes — beginners arguably benefit most. No chart-drawing or indicator knowledge needed: every signal carries a full plan, and you can size positions as "the % of my account I'm willing to risk." We recommend starting on a demo account.
landing.faq5q: What do I need to get connected?
landing.faq5a: Three things: ① an MT5 account at our partner broker MakeCapital (live or demo — opening one takes minutes); ② a Windows PC running MT5 (kept online); ③ a PRISMX account. You can watch signals and fire orders from your phone anywhere — execution happens on your PC's MT5.
landing.faq6a: Currently gold (XAUUSD), major FX pairs and popular instruments like BTC. We deliberately don't cover everything — deep multi-timeframe work on a few instruments beats shallow coverage of a hundred.
landing.faq7a: Free during the beta — no credit card. The full release will be subscription-based, and beta users get an exclusive discount.
landing.faq8q: Will following the signals make me money?
landing.faq8a: Nobody can promise that — anyone who does is lying to you. Trading always carries risk and past performance never guarantees the future. What PRISMX offers is discipline and transparency: complete plans, locked-in stops, honest records. The decisions — and the risk — remain yours.
landing.ctaTitle: Enter your next trade with a plan
landing.ctaSubtitle: Completely free during beta. Sign up to see live signals, the public win rate, and connect your own MT5.
landing.ctaNote: No credit card · sign-up takes 30 seconds
landing.demoCta: Sign up to see live signals
landing.footerRisk: Risk disclosure: trading FX, precious metals and crypto assets carries a high level of risk and may result in loss of capital. Past signal performance does not guarantee future results. PRISMX provides technical signal and execution tooling only and does not constitute investment advice; whether and how to trade remains entirely your decision.

order.riskNeedsSl: Set a stop loss to size by risk %
order.slWrongSide: Stop loss is on the wrong side of the current price
order.tpWrongSide: Take profit is on the wrong side of the current price
order.signalExpiredInModal: This signal just expired and can no longer be traded
order.slTpInvalid: Fix the stop loss / take profit before confirming
order.riskNote: Live prices may differ slightly from entry due to network latency. Execution is subject to your MT5 broker. Please double-check volume and side.
order.ackTimeout: No receipt yet, check the Orders page for the latest status
order.timeoutNote: If the command is not executed within 5 minutes (e.g. the Bridge is offline), it is cancelled automatically and will never fill later at a stale price. This platform provides signal tooling only, not investment advice. Trade at your own risk.
order.eaOffline: No MT5 connection online, cannot place order
order.noBridge: No MT5 connected yet. Open the PRISMX Bridge app, paste your token and start it, then place the order.
order.allOffline: All connected MT5 accounts are currently offline. Make sure the PRISMX Bridge app is running and MT5 is logged in, then retry.

account.title: Account
account.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
account.notifUpgradeRequired: Push notifications aren't included in the free tier — upgrade to unlock
account.notifNoCategories: No indicator categories yet, run the signal engine first
account.notifPermissionDenied: Notification permission denied; enable in browser settings
account.notifBlocked: Notifications blocked by browser; enable in browser settings
account.autoHint: Rules are set in R units (R = the stop distance at open). E.g. move the stop to entry once the trade is up 1R. Applies only to positions opened through PRISMX — manual trades are never touched; positions opened without a stop have no defined R and are skipped. Every automated command shows up on the Orders page, fully traceable.
account.autoUpgradeRequired: Auto position management is a PRO feature — upgrade to unlock
account.autoScopeNote: The stop only ever moves in your favor — risk is never widened. Commands execute on your MT5 via the bridge; nothing happens while the bridge is offline.

charts.title: Charts
charts.subtitle: Live candlestick view; symbol follows your positions and signals
charts.disclaimer: Chart data is provided by TradingView. The quote source may differ slightly from your broker and is for reference only.

winrate.strategyHint: Based on whether price hit take-profit or stop-loss first — the same for everyone, independent of anyone's trading behavior.
winrate.personalHint: Based on your own real closed trades.
winrate.disclaimer: Past performance does not guarantee future results.

bind.title: Connect MT5
bind.subtitle: Run the PRISMX Bridge app and paste your token to connect your MT5 accounts
bind.accountsHint: Accounts reported by the PRISMX Bridge app. Multiple MT5 terminals show up here.
bind.accountQuotaReached: You've reached your plan's account limit. Upgrade to connect more MT5 accounts.
bind.brokerOnly: Only {{name}} MT5 accounts can connect (live and demo alike); accounts from other brokers are not accepted.
bind.deleteNeedOffline: Disconnect the bridge (account offline) before deleting
bind.deleteConfirm: Remove account {{login}} from your list? It will reappear if the bridge reports it again.
bind.tokenHint: This token is like a password. Keep it safe. Paste it into the PRISMX Bridge app to connect.
bind.tokenHidden: For security the token is stored encrypted and shown only once at generation. Click "Reset Token" to generate and view a new one (the old token stops working).
bind.tokenJustOnce: Copy and store it now — it cannot be viewed again after you refresh or leave this page.
bind.resetConfirm: Resetting invalidates the old token immediately. Any running Bridge app must be updated with the new token, or it will fail to connect. Reset?
bind.suffixHint: If your broker's symbols carry a suffix (e.g. the .sc in GBPUSD.sc), enter it here. It will be appended to the symbol when placing orders. Leave empty for none.
bind.suffixNeedAccount: The suffix is saved per account. Run the Bridge app so an account is reported first.
bind.suffixPerAccountHint: Edit the suffix directly in each account's row above.

steps.title: Setup Steps
steps.s2: Download and run the PRISMX Bridge app on the PC where MT5 is logged in
steps.s3: Paste the token into the Bridge app and start it
steps.s4: Wait until the connection status turns online, then trade from the signal panel

connStatus.reconnecting: Connection lost, reconnecting… quotes and positions may be stale

download.title: Download PRISMX Bridge
download.subtitle: The local app that links your MT5 terminals to PRISMX Signal Lab
download.whatDesc: PRISMX Bridge is a small app that runs on your computer. It automatically scans the MT5 terminals you're logged into, securely connects to the backend with your API token, reports accounts and positions to the web app, and executes the orders you send from the signal panel. Every trade runs on your own MT5.
download.g1Desc: Click the button above to download the installer and run it. If Windows shows "Windows protected your PC", click "More info → Run anyway".
download.g2Desc: Go to the Connect MT5 page and copy your API token. Treat it like a password and never share it.
download.g3Desc: Make sure MT5 is open and logged into your trading account on the same computer running the bridge. Multiple terminals can be logged in at once.
download.g4Desc: Open the bridge, paste your token, and click Connect. Once the status turns online, you can place orders from the signal panel.
download.n1: The bridge must stay running. Closing it stops receiving and executing trades.
download.n2: Run the bridge on the same computer where MT5 is logged in.
download.n3: Enable "Allow algorithmic trading" in MT5, otherwise orders will be rejected by the terminal.
download.n4: Your API token is like a password. Never share it; if you suspect a leak, reset it anytime on the Connect MT5 page.
download.n5: Windows only; macOS is not supported yet.
download.sourceDesc: The installer is hosted on GitHub Releases, where you can review release notes and file checksums.

admin.brokerPatternsHint: An MT5 account passes if its server name contains any keyword (case-insensitive; live and demo alike). E.g. "MakeCapital" matches both MakeCapital-Live and MakeCapital-Demo.
